vision_profile.current_state: Vivek is a 23-year-old B.Sc CS graduate operating a cyber cafe, solving daily computer problems informally.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest obstacle is the lack of formal recognition and structured learning to transition his practical skills into a professional IT role.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is highly motivated to convert his existing problem-solving experience into a recognized IT helpdesk position with a proper title and better salary.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can confidently handle basic IT support requests, understand network fundamentals, and apply structured problem-solving to common user issues.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building the bedrock of your IT career, transforming your daily problem-solving into recognized professional skills.

modules.title: Foundations of System Design
lessons: Software Installation & Configuration Basics (MS Office, Drivers)

science.desc: A user reports their printer isn't working after a Windows update. Diagnose the issue and guide them through troubleshooting steps.

modules.title: Networking & Communication
lessons: What is a Network? (LAN, WAN, Internet)
Basic Network Devices (Router, Switch, Access Point)

science.desc: A user cannot access shared network drives. Their computer has an IP address, but they can't ping the server. What steps do you take?

modules.title: OOP & SOLID Principles
lessons: Principles of Modularity & Reusability in IT Solutions
Logical Flow for Complex Problem Solving

science.desc: Describe a complex problem you've solved. How did you break it down and ensure your solution was robust?

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can diagnose and resolve common IT issues related to security, data storage, and user accounts, applying foundational cybersecurity hygiene.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a reliable first responder, securing user systems and managing essential data operations.

modules.title: Security
lessons: Introduction to Cybersecurity for End Users

science.desc: A user clicked on a suspicious link and now their browser is redirecting to unknown sites. What steps do you take to secure their system?

modules.title: Databases & Storage
lessons: Introduction to Data Storage Types (HDD, SSD, Network Drives)

science.desc: A user accidentally deleted an important document. What steps would you advise them to take, and what are the limitations?

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can troubleshoot more complex system interactions, understand distributed IT environments, and optimize system performance for end-users.
milestones.identity_statement: You are expanding your toolkit, tackling interconnected systems and enhancing the efficiency of IT services.

modules.title: Distributed Systems
lessons: Introduction to Cloud Services & SaaS Applications
Basic API Concepts for IT Services

science.desc: Users are reporting slow access to a cloud-based CRM application. Other network services are fine. How do you investigate?

modules.title: Scalability & Performance
lessons: Identifying Performance Bottlenecks (CPU, RAM, Disk I/O)
Basic Scripting for Automation (e.g., batch files)

science.desc: A user complains their computer is very slow. What are the first three things you check, and why?

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can contribute to maintaining system uptime, ensure service reliability, and understand the modularity of modern IT services.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a proactive contributor, ensuring the smooth and continuous operation of IT infrastructure.

modules.title: Reliability & Observability
lessons: Monitoring Tools for IT Helpdesk (e.g., basic network monitoring)

science.desc: A critical business application crashes intermittently. You check the Event Viewer and see recurring errors. What's your next step?

modules.title: Microservices Architecture
lessons: Monolithic vs. Microservices: An IT Perspective
Impact of Service Outages on End Users
API Gateways & Load Balancers (Conceptual for Helpdesk)

science.desc: How does understanding that an application is made of many small parts help you troubleshoot a problem compared to a single large application?

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can address more complex technical issues, understand how IT services interact at a deeper level, and optimize system concurrency.
milestones.identity_statement: You are mastering advanced technical challenges, becoming a go-to expert for intricate IT problems.

modules.title: API Design & Service Layer
lessons: Common API Use Cases in IT (e.g., integrations)
Using Tools like Postman (or browser dev tools) for API testing

science.desc: A third-party application integrated with an internal system is failing to sync data. Where would you start looking for the problem?

modules.title: Concurrency & Multithreading
lessons: Processes vs. Threads: Understanding System Execution

science.desc: A user reports an application frequently becomes 'Not Responding'. What might be causing this, and how would you investigate?

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can analyze complex IT scenarios, contribute to project planning, and implement structured testing and logging for IT solutions.
milestones.identity_statement: You are evolving into a strategic thinker, contributing to the broader IT landscape and improving operational workflows.

modules.title: Case Studies
lessons: Designing Solutions for Common IT Challenges

science.desc: Your company is migrating to a new email system. Outline the potential helpdesk challenges and how you would prepare for them.

modules.title: Testing, Logging & DevOps Foundations
lessons: Importance of Testing IT Solutions (e.g., new software deployments)
Types of Testing (UAT, Integration Testing - conceptual)

science.desc: Why is it important for IT support to be involved in the testing phase of new software or system rollouts?

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You are prepared for advanced IT roles, can mentor junior staff, and continuously improve IT processes and user experience.
milestones.identity_statement: You are a leader in IT support, shaping the future of technical assistance and empowering your team.

modules.title: Capstone & Career Readiness
lessons: Resume Building & Portfolio for IT Roles

science.desc: Imagine you are interviewing for a senior helpdesk role. What is your philosophy on customer service and problem resolution?
